title: How can I format urls in a item update?
excerpt: I include a url into an update and it is displayed in full and works fine. But I want to choose the displayed text, instead of showing the full url. How can I do this?

posts.author: Lafisrap (Michael Schmidt)
posts.cookedHtml: I include a url into an update and it is displayed in full and works fine. But I want to choose the displayed text, instead of showing the full url. How can I do this?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @Lafisrap,

How are you creating the update? From the UI or via API?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello again,

I just saw your other topic.

You can do it like this via API:

mutation{
  create_update(item_id:1234567890, body: "<a href='https://www.google.com/'>Text</a>") {
    id
  }
}

Let us know if you have any other questions!

Cheers,
Matias
